topic: There is a passenger in my rearview mirror at every red light but the backseat is empty when I turn around
title: There Is a Passenger in My Rearview Mirror at Every Red Light | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There is a passenger in my rearview mirror at every red light. The backseat is empty when I turn around.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a rearview mirror in a car at night reflecting a darkened backseat with the faint outline of a head and shoulders silhouette, traffic light glow seen through the rear window, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Drive home every night from downtown. Eight red lights between the office and my driveway.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a city downtown street at night viewed through a car windshield, a red traffic light visible ahead, dim street lamps, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Two thousand sixteen Toyota. I drive alone.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of the interior of a Toyota sedan at night from the driver's perspective, only the steering wheel and dashboard visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Noticed it six months ago. Only at red lights. Head and shoulders. Sitting upright behind me.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a rearview mirror showing a faint humanoid silhouette in the empty backseat of a car, the red glow of a stoplight reflecting on the dashboard, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Adjusted the mirror. Wiped it down.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand wiping a rearview mirror with a cloth from the driver's seat, only the hand visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Still there. Same shape. Same posture. Tilts when the car turns.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a rearview mirror at a red light reflecting a still humanoid silhouette in the empty backseat, red ambient glow on the windshield, vertical 9:16 framing
wide interior shot of a car backseat seen from over the driver's shoulder, the seat empty, a single dome light barely glowing, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Empty. Belt unbuckled. Cushion flat. Looked back at the mirror. Still there.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a clean empty backseat of a car with the seatbelt hanging loose, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Filmed the mirror with my phone for a week. The footage shows my empty backseat. The eyes do not show.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone mounted to the dashboard with the screen showing video of an empty backseat reflected in a rearview mirror, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last Tuesday at Fourth and Brannan the silhouette turned its head and looked directly at me.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a rearview mirror at night reflecting a faintly turned humanoid silhouette in the backseat angled toward the front, red stoplight glow on the windshield, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have started taking the long way home.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an empty suburban street at night seen through a car windshield, no traffic lights ahead, dim moonlight, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning the cushion in my backseat held a faint indent. Anchor shaped. Like a car seat had been there.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a car backseat cushion with a small rectangular indent pressed into the fabric near the seatbelt anchor, dim garage light, vertical 9:16 framing
